nasb.text: For a voice of wailing is heard from Zion, ‘How are we ruined! We are put to great shame, For we have left the land, Because they have cast down our dwellings.’ ”

esv.text: For a sound of wailing is heard from Zion: ‘How we are ruined! We are utterly shamed, because we have left the land, because they have cast down our dwellings.’”

cnv.text: 因為從錫安可以聽到哀聲，說： ‘我們何等衰敗！ 我們多麼羞恥！ 因我們丟棄了這地， 我們的家園被拆毀了。’”

ccb.text: 因为从锡安传出哀鸣， ‘我们灭亡了！ 我们受了奇耻大辱！ 我们的家园被毁， 我们只好背井离乡。’”
